images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with flawless skin texture and large expressive eyes, embodying a relaxed weekend vibe amidst a tropical waterfall. She is playfully wearing a loosely tied, white silk bathrobe that clings to her fit, curvy body, revealing a hint of cleavage and the soft texture of the fabric against her wet skin. She holds a transparent umbrella over her head while tilting her head to blow a kiss at the security camera, creating a candid, interactive moment. The scene is illuminated by bright, clear car headlights that cut through the mist, ensuring high visibility without heavy shadows. The background features the lush, rushing waterfall and greenery, rendered in desaturated, muted tones. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
